name: workspace-module-operate
title: Workspace Module 操作面 (invoke + present)
description: workspace_module_invoke 按 module 来源分支派发(extension→RuntimeGateway, canvas→现有 canvas service, builtin→对应 service)+服务端 schema/权限/归属校验;workspace_module_present best-effort GUI 推送与诊断;canvas 首轮包现有 service 不另起 authoring。
creator: claude-agent
